name: Phandalin
summary: A frontier mining town where wagon trails, prospectors, old ruins and local tensions make even small troubles feel dangerous.
politics: Townmasters, miners, farmers and outside interests all pull in different directions.
Local law is thin and often depends on who is brave enough to act.
culture: Practical frontier folk value work, trade and reputation.
News travels quickly through the inn, provisioner and miners’ exchange.
